introSection: Maranello Twist is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer EOS Rides currently located at Kingoland in Plumelin, Brittany, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened at Kingoland on 22 April 2023.

fullText:
Maranello Twist is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer EOS Rides currently located at Kingoland in Plumelin, Brittany, France.

The ride opened at Kingoland on 22 April 2023.
